steps.subject: Welcome to Dogwise, {{firstname}}! 🐕
steps.body:
Hi {{firstname}},

Thanks for reaching out to Dogwise Academy! I saw your inquiry come in and wanted to introduce myself personally — I'll be your point of contact here.

Our board-and-train programs are built around one idea: real training happens in real life, not just in a classroom. I'd love to hear a bit more about your dog and what you're hoping to work on.

Do you have 10 minutes this week for a quick call?

Best,
{{sender_firstname}}

onboarding.label: Onboarding Checklist (Closed Won)

firstEmail.subject: Welcome to Dogwise, {{firstname}}! Let's get everything ready 🎉
firstEmail.body:
Hi {{firstname}},

I'm Anita, and I'll be helping you get everything set up before the big day — {{deal.program_start_date}}. If you have any questions at any point, just reply to this email; I'm here to help.

I'll also be sending you an invite to your private Signal chat group shortly, where you'll get updates and photos during training.

onboarding.checklistLeadIn: Here's what we still need before {{deal.program_start_date}}:

relaxed.subject: Getting ready for {{deal.program_start_date}} — a few items left
relaxed.body:
Hi {{firstname}},

Just a friendly check-in from me — we're getting everything ready for the start date on {{deal.program_start_date}}, and there are still a couple of items on our list:

approaching.subject: {{days_left}} days to go — let's tick off the last items
approaching.body:
Hi {{firstname}},

We're only {{days_left}} days away from the start date ({{deal.program_start_date}}), and I want to make sure everything is squared away in time. Here's what's still outstanding:

urgent.subject: Important: needed before {{deal.program_start_date}}
urgent.body:
Hi {{firstname}},

The start date is almost here ({{deal.program_start_date}}) and we still need the items below. Without them we may not be able to start on time, so if there's anything I can do to help you get these sorted today, just reply and I'll jump on it:

blocks.intake_form: 📋 Client Intake Form — takes about 5 minutes: [Complete your intake form](https://share.hsforms.com/1AvDdJ2T5Qgu57pqhCIoqiQd0qii?email={{email}})
blocks.manager_form: 📝 Training Management Form — this tells your trainer everything about your pup: [Complete your training form](https://share.hsforms.com/1H02ktVe1QQaSl90DsQQ3bwd0qii?email={{email}})
blocks.balance:
💳 Remaining balance of {{deal.amount_outstanding}} — you can pay securely here:
[[button:Pay remaining balance|{{deal.remaining_balance_link}}]]
blocks.vaccine_dhlpp: 💉 DHLPP vaccination record — please have your vet send it over or reply to this email with a photo/scan.
blocks.vaccine_bordetella: 💉 Bordetella vaccination record — please have your vet send it over or reply to this email with a photo/scan.
blocks.vaccine_rabies: 💉 Rabies vaccination record — please have your vet send it over or reply to this email with a photo/scan.

onboarding.signoff:
Thanks so much — and if anything here is confusing or you've already sent something, just reply and let me know!

Warmly,
{{sender_firstname}}
Dogwise Academy
